positive: A stylized, neo-retro woodland creature silhouette—a playful, majestic fox mixed with woodland fauna, depicted in a bold, whimsical art deco style. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, featuring the fox amid stylized leaves, mushrooms, and winding branches. Use strong black linework and geometric patterns accented by a limited, vibrant color palette of deep emerald, burnt orange, and cream. The style should mimic sophisticated vintage botanical illustration and mid-century modern graphic design, ensuring clean lines, high contrast, and excellent legibility when printed on fabric. Flat design elements are encouraged for maximum print versatility. Perfect symmetry and clear separation between elements.
negative: low resolution, blurry, fuzzy, ugly, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, complex shadows, depth of field, photorealistic
